content: User is working on a February revenue report by joining three CSV exports located in a 'data' folder.
User is working on a monthly cohort retention report using CRM export data located in the project's data folder.
A migration on March 10, 2026, introduced a NOT NULL constraint on the product_category_id column in the finance models.
The user is analyzing an A/B test with a baseline conversion rate of 11.99% and a total sample size of approximately 25,000 visitors.
The user is investigating a €13,000 discrepancy in their e-commerce metrics.
